title: BTC Holds $62K as Altcoins Show Recovery Signs
summary: Bitcoin maintains support above $62,000 as the broader crypto market begins to recover from June's correction. Altcoin Season Index hovers at 49 — borderline shift from Bitcoin dominance.

title: Binance Futures Adds New Perpetual Contracts for AI Tokens
summary: Binance Futures announced the listing of new USD-margined perpetual contracts for selected AI-focused tokens, expanding trading options for the growing AI-crypto sector.

title: Fear & Greed Index at 19 — Extreme Fear Grips Market
summary: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index has dropped to 19, signaling Extreme Fear among investors. Historical data suggests such levels have often preceded significant market reversals.

title: BTC Dominance Tests Key Support — Altcoin Season Potential
summary: Bitcoin dominance is testing critical support between 57-59% after breaking down from a multi-year rising channel. A breakdown could signal the start of a sustained altcoin season.

title: Solana Ecosystem TVL Rebounds 12% in Weekly Recovery
summary: Total value locked across Solana-based protocols has recovered 12% this week, signaling renewed capital inflow. DeFi activity picking up despite broader market uncertainty.
